description: Update the public template from v0.3.2 to the immutable v0.3.3 stack release that contains native Hermes prompt-capability detection and validated WSL proof.
acceptance: R-1: The template requires stack version 0.3.3 and immutable ref v0.3.3 resolved to the published release commit.
R-2: The stack-update record preserves the before/after contract and exact resolved commit without absolute path leakage.
R-3: Clone-local, Linux/WSL, stack pairing, and live Hermes doctor checks pass without GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV=1.
